summary: A clip from The Charlie Kirk Show (Real America's Voice) featuring a phone interview with DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin, shown with an 'ON THE PHONE' graphic alongside B-roll of a Minneapolis fraud site. This is a recorded talk-show interview, not entertainment-style produced content.
notable_text: ON THE PHONE - TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN ASSISTANT SECRETARY DEPT. OF HOMELAND SECURITY; THE CHARLIE KIRK SHOW; REAL AMERICA'S VOICE
